feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: sd70av3a is not working for order-related invoices
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a batch job for sending invoice PDF to customers by email. It is working fine for delivery-related invoices, we can generate the output and able to send PDF. but the same is not working for order-related invoices. we are using this program sd70av3a for batch. Does this only work for delivery related invoices???
VF31

VF02



Pls help on this.

entry.title: table partition for sale tables XYZ, in SAP with oracle DB.
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I am looking table partition in oracle DB with SAP, I have followed the note 722188 but unable to proceed.

can I get some help toward syntax commands for table XYZ already exist inside the system.(Oracle +SAP)

entry.title: Change S_ALR_87009957 (customer list) to ALV
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
Is there an option to turn the S_ALR_87009957 report into ALV grid?
Maybe some user parameter?
Thanks!

entry.title: Generate one intervention report for group checkout
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

i'm trying to create a BR that make me to generate one intervention report for group checkout

can any one help me in this task 

thank you

entry.title: Error while creating material master with Accounting view
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am facing an error "Internal error in FORM/FUNCTION CKMS_PERIOD_POST_DELTA in position 0 with RC" while creating a material master with accounting view in SAP S/4 HANA. ML is also activated but the material is not creating due to this error. If anyone of you face the same error and know the root cause/fix, please help me to fix this error. 

Thank you

entry.title: I am getting error I am not able to see simulation and edit it
I am getting editing server access as well check out I have checked but still issue is there
Also I am not able to change settings it showing folder and 1 how to remove folder sign and 1 from
My every simulation gone one page
Custom domain for HTML5 application on CF
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,

I'm from Xmake team. And recently Project Portal migrated from Neo to Cloud Foundry. For UI we use SAPUI5 framework.
By default, CF platform for HTML5 applications creates a URL that is too cumbersome and incomprehensible.  On NEO platform we could easily use a custom domain projectportal.tools.sap. 
The use of custom domains in Cloud Foundry is mentioned in this note https://me.sap.com/notes/0003400100. And according to the documentation https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/setting-up-custom-domain, a custom domain can only be the default site and not to a specific site, or more precisely the Fiori launchpad.
Do I understand correctly that on CF platform we will not be able to get to our new site by URL, but only to the default launchpad where we will need to click on a tile to go to our new Project Portal site?
If this is so, then it is not at all the same as it was. We would want to use old domain directly. What alternatives do we have? Please help me figure it out.  Thanks.

entry.title: Error en Data Transfer Workbench: ';' no permitido en nombres
entry.content:
Hola que tal a mi me esta pasando con el chart of acounts le doy delimitado por comas o punto y coma y me dice que Error en Data Transfer Workbench: ';' no permitido en nombres abro el archivo y hay un monton de ; pero es la version txt los quite lo spremplace y nada 

gracias si alguine me puede ayudar

entry.title: I need some 6 real time examples relating to Gap Analysis and Tickets of SAP MM.
Incident management
entry.content:
hello expert 

  1. PSE Tier 1 & 2 ( process safety event ) 
  2. A Level 1 Process Safety Event (PSE Tier 1) is a primary containment loss (LOPC) with the most severe consequences. On the other hand, a Level 2 process security event (PSE Tier 2) is also a LOPC, but with less consequences. These classifications are used to report unplanned or uncontrolled events.
  3. A Tier 1 Process Safety Event (T-1 PSE) is a loss of primary containment (LOPC) with the greatest consequence as defined by API RP754. A T-1 PSE is an unplanned or uncontrolled release of any material, including non-toxic and non-flammable materials1 (e.g. steam, hot water, nitrogen, compressed CO2, or compressed air), from a process that results in one or more of the consequences
  4. The question is : Can PSE Tier1&2 be added to incident management because we need it in dashboard ? 
  5. the bast regard

entry.title: Schedule agreement print
entry.content:
Hello There

When SA is outputted from ME9E as shown below, the unit price registered in SA is all output by period as shown below.

I only want to show the unit price that is currently applied, what should I do?

entry.title: Item number is missing; specify an item number [IGN1].ItemCode[line: 1]
entry.content:
DI Error:(-5002)

Item number is missing; specify an item number [IGN1.ItemCode][line: 1]

entry.title: Commitment value in s_alr_87013558 report isn't changing after MIGO(for GR) for ACC. Assignment Q
Not able to see my old answers, badges etc. in new sap community portal
entry.content:
Hi,

I am not able to see my old contributions to the sap community, like my answers, earned badges, replies etc.

Also in my old answers my name is not showing its showing as former member instead.

is it possible to bring my old contents and reputation section back to the new portal ?

Thanks,

Akhilesh

@jerryjanda

entry.title: Fiori Migration Cockpit Error "Another activity is in process for this project. Try again later."
entry.content:
Our team has just moved from LTMC to the Fiori launchpad migration cockpit for data uploading. I have created a Migration project with three objects:

1) Object Classification - Material (MARA)

2) Product

3) Product - extend existing records by new org levels.

The issue we are facing is some unexplained error that occurs randomly at any stage for any object either when we click the Prepare or Simulate button it gives us the error "Another activity is in process for this project. Try again later." (Picture attached) and below that error, it gives a warning popup "Migration cockpit The preparation step has failed for one or more migration objects. Navigate to the "Monitoring" screen for details.".

But when we see in the Running activities or Monitoring tab nothing is running and it shows '0' in running activities. Sometimes no such error occurs and it let us upload the template smoothly with all steps but sometimes this error occurs randomly so we have to upload templates again and do turnarounds in order to load it.

All the pictures are attached for your reference please let me know how to resolve this issue so that we can upload all the templates smoothly without such errors.

Thanks

entry.title: Result of recording(QM) column grey out in QA02
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need help in enhancing Result of recording(QM) in QA02, I need to grey out result field in general tab based conditions, if condition satisfies then result column field should be greyed out. 
in my requirement we a re maintaining  user in a custom table, if the user is maintained in the table then field should be greyed out.
please help me with this.

 

Thank & regards,

Namdev

entry.title: Job application
entry.content: We have legal requirements for Mexico employees to insert their full name(4 names) in EC but due to the setup in job application where the candidates fill first/ middle/Last names, the names are captured incorrectly in EC. We want to streamline this by having Mexico employees enter their full names in the first name field only. As per SAP these fields are standard linked to the candidate profile and can't be hidden/modified for a specific country through front-end config. is there a Fix?
